mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing 4.5 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced consumer spending, causing negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 55 percent of instances when the trigger fires.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive returns occur in less than 40 percent of co-movement instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during rate hikes confirms resilient supply-side growth that offsets financial headwinds, producing positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Returns are negative in greater than 60 percent of tightening periods with rising industrial production.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic capacity and wage growth, supporting corporate earnings and positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Sharpe ratio falls below 0.5 over 5-year out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, increasing discount rates and depressing equity valuations.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in greater than 50 percent of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP growth and rising retail sales confirm broad-based demand recovery, leading to sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Co-movement instances yield negative returns in greater than 55 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during economic contractions signals collapsing output and margin compression, generating negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than 45 percent of contraction periods with falling industrial production.
